recommendations.title: We All Loved Each Other So Much
recommendations.overview: Three partisans bound by a strong friendship return home after the war, but the clash with everyday reality puts a strain on their bond.

recommendations.title: The Terrace
recommendations.overview: Eight Italian politicians from the communist party gather on a terrace in Rome for a get-together. They discuss about their past, present and future.

recommendations.title: What Time Is It?
recommendations.overview: A father and his son who lived seperated for some time meet each other one day and try to talk their problems over and understand their diametrical differences.

recommendations.title: A Drama of Jealousy (and other things)
recommendations.overview: Construction worker Oreste and young fiancee Adelaide meet Nello, a cook in a pizzeria. This love triangle often goes to communist rallies, and enjoys the filthy beaches of Ostia. Will the hostile environment pave a way to jealousy?

recommendations.title: Ugly, Dirty and Bad
recommendations.overview: Giacinto lives with his wife, their ten children and various other family members in a shack on the hills of Rome. Some time ago he has lost his left eye while at work, and got a consistent sum of money from the insurance company, which he keeps hidd

recommendations.title: The Family
recommendations.overview: "The Family," an album with a velvet cover, is meant to touch the extended family of man. Formal portraits, bookends in this 80-year saga, enclose the central story, which opens with the baptism of Carlo, a baby in his grandfather's lap, and ends wit

recommendations.title: Forrest Gump
recommendations.overview: A man with a low IQ has accomplished great things in his life and been present during significant historic events—in each case, far exceeding what anyone imagined he could do. But despite all he has achieved, his one true love eludes him.

recommendations.title: The New Monsters
recommendations.overview: A comedy film composed of 14 episodes. It is a sequel to I mostri, made in 1963. 1. The Finch of Val Padouan (Ettore Scola) - 2. Tantum ergo (Dino Risi) - 3. Hitchhiking (Mario Monicelli) - 4. Kidnapping of a Beloved Person (Ettore Scola) - 5. First
recommendations.director: Ettore Scola, Mario Monicelli, Dino Risi

recommendations.title: Jojo Rabbit
recommendations.overview: Jojo, a lonely German boy during World War II has his world shaken when he learns that his single mother is hiding a Jewish girl in their home. Influenced by a buffoonish imaginary version of Adolf Hitler, he begins to question his beliefs and confro

recommendations.title: In the Mood for Love
recommendations.overview: Two neighbors form a strong bond after both suspect extramarital activities of their spouses. However, they agree to keep their bond platonic so as not to commit similar wrongs.
